title: acrolophus ovinus
intro: Acrolophus ovinus, also known as the "woolly bear aloe," is a type of succulent plant native to Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Acrolophus ovinus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Acrolophus ovinus can be made by drying and grinding the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or topical creams.
